350: func (s *Server) validateServiceAccountToken(ctx context.Context, token string) (string, error) {
351: 	if username, ok := s.tokenCache.Get(token); ok {
352: 		return username, nil
353: 	}
354: 
355: 	review := &corev1.TokenReview{
356: 		Spec: corev1.TokenReviewSpec{
357: 			Token: token,
358: 		},
359: 	}
360: 
361: 	result, err := s.k8sClient.clientset.AuthenticationV1().TokenReviews().Create(ctx, review, metav1.CreateOptions{})
362: 	if err != nil {
363: 		return "", err
364: 	}
365: 
366: 	if !result.Status.Authenticated {
367: 		return "", errors.New("token not authenticated")
368: 	}
369: 
370: 	username := result.Status.User.Username
371: 	s.tokenCache.Set(token, username)
372: 
373: 	return username, nil
374: }

433: func (s *Server) runGarbageCollector(ctx context.Context) {
434: 	ticker := time.NewTicker(15 * time.Second)
435: 	defer ticker.Stop()
436: 
437: 	for {
438: 		select {
439: 		case <-ctx.Done():
440: 			return
441: 		case <-ticker.C:
442: 			s.garbageCollect(ctx)
443: 		}
444: 	}
445: }

447: func (s *Server) garbageCollect(ctx context.Context) {
448: 	gcCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 2*time.Minute)
449: 	defer cancel()
450: 
451: 	inactiveCutoff := time.Now().Add(-DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout)
452: 	inactive, err := s.storeClient.ListInactiveSandboxes(gcCtx, inactiveCutoff, 16)
453: 	if err != nil {
454: 		klog.Warningf("failed to list inactive sandboxes: %v", err)
455: 	}
456: 
457: 	expired, err := s.storeClient.ListExpiredSandboxes(gcCtx, time.Now(), 16)
458: 	if err != nil {
459: 		klog.Warningf("failed to list expired sandboxes: %v", err)
460: 	}
461: 
462: 	seen := make(map[string]bool)
463: 	for _, sandbox := range append(inactive, expired...) {
464: 		if seen[sandbox.SessionID] {
465: 			continue
466: 		}
467: 		seen[sandbox.SessionID] = true
468: 
469: 		var gvr schema.GroupVersionResource
470: 		if sandbox.Kind == types.SandboxClaimsKind {
471: 			gvr = SandboxClaimGVR
472: 		} else {
473: 			gvr = SandboxGVR
474: 		}
475: 
476: 		err := s.k8sClient.dynamicClient.Resource(gvr).Namespace(sandbox.SandboxNamespace).Delete(gcCtx, sandbox.Name, metav1.DeleteOptions{})
477: 		if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, metav1.ErrNotFound) {
478: 			klog.Warningf("failed to delete sandbox %s: %v", sandbox.Name, err)
479: 			continue
480: 		}
481: 
482: 		s.storeClient.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(gcCtx, sandbox.SessionID)
483: 	}

97: 	}
98: }

100: func (tc *TokenCache) Get(token string) (string, bool) {
101: 	tc.mu.RLock()
102: 	defer tc.mu.RUnlock()
103: 	entry, ok := tc.tokens[token]
104: 	if !ok {
105: 		return "", false
106: 	}
107: 	if time.Since(entry.lastAccess) > tc.ttl {
108: 		return "", false
109: 	}

135: 	}
136: }

138: func (r *SandboxReconciler) WatchSandboxOnce(namespace, name string) <-chan struct{} {
139: 	key := types.NamespacedName{Namespace: namespace, Name: name}
140: 	ch := make(chan struct{}, 1)
141: 
142: 	r.mu.Lock()
143: 	r.watchers[key] = ch
144: 	r.mu.Unlock()
145: 
146: 	return ch
147: }
148: 
149: func (r *SandboxReconciler) NotifySandboxRunning(namespace, name string) {
150: 	key := types.NamespacedName{Namespace: namespace, Name: name}
151: 
152: 	r.mu.RLock()
153: 	ch, ok := r.watchers[key]
154: 	r.mu.RUnlock()
155: 
156: 	if ok {
157: 		select {
158: 		case ch <- struct{}{}:
159: 		default:
160: 		}
161: 	}
162: }
163: 
164: func (r *SandboxReconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req types.NamespacedName) error {
165: 	sandbox, err := r.k8sClient.dynamicClient.Resource(SandboxGVR).Namespace(req.Namespace).Get(ctx, req.Name, metav1.GetOptions{})
166: 	if err != nil {
167: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
168: 			return nil
169: 		}
170: 		return err
171: 	}
172: 
173: 	status := sandbox.Object["status"]
174: 	if status == nil {
175: 		return nil
176: 	}
177: 
178: 	statusMap, ok := status.(map[string]interface{})
179: 	if !ok {
180: 		return nil
181: 	}
182: 
183: 	conditions, ok := statusMap["conditions"].([]interface{})
184: 	if !ok {
185: 		return nil
186: 	}
187: 
188: 	for _, c := range conditions {
189: 		cond, ok := c.(map[string]interface{})
190: 		if !ok {
191: 			continue
192: 		}
193: 		if cond["type"] == "Ready" && cond["status"] == "True" {
194: 			r.NotifySandboxRunning(req.Namespace, req.Name)
195: 			break
196: 		}
197: 	}
198: 
199: 	return nil

17: 	apierrors "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"

27: const (
28: 	DefaultSandboxTTL         = 8 * time.Hour
29: 	DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout = 15 * time.Minute
30: )
31: 
32: var (
33: 	SessionIdLabelKey         = "runtime.agentcube.io/session-id"
34: 	WorkloadNameLabelKey      = "runtime.agentcube.io/workload-name"
35: 	SandboxNameLabelKey       = "runtime.agentcube.io/sandbox-name"
36: 	LastActivityAnnotationKey = "last-activity-time"
37: 	IdleTimeoutAnnotationKey  = "runtime.agentcube.io/idle-timeout"
38: )
39: 
40: type ErrorResponse struct {
41: 	Message string `json:"message"`
42: }
43: 
44: type Config struct {
45: 	Port             string
46: 	RuntimeClassName string
47: 	EnableTLS        bool
48: 	TLSCert          string
49: 	TLSKey           string
50: 	EnableAuth       bool
51: }
52: 
53: type Server struct {
54: 	config            *Config
55: 	router            *gin.Engine
56: 	httpServer        *http.Server
57: 	k8sClient         *K8sClient
58: 	sandboxController *SandboxReconciler
59: 	tokenCache        *TokenCache
60: 	informers         *Informers
61: 	storeClient       store.Store
62: 	wg                sync.WaitGroup
63: }
64: 
65: func NewServer(config *Config) (*Server, error) {
66: 	s := &Server{
67: 		config:      config,
68: 		storeClient: store.Storage(),
69: 		tokenCache:  NewTokenCache(1000, 5*time.Minute),
70: 	}
71: 
72: 	if err := s.initK8sClient(); err != nil {
73: 		return nil, err
74: 	}
75: 
76: 	s.sandboxController = NewSandboxReconciler(s.k8sClient, s.storeClient)
77: 
78: 	gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)
79: 	s.router = gin.New()
80: 
81: 	s.setupRoutes()
82: 
83: 	return s, nil
84: }
85: 
86: func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
87: 	s.router.GET("/health", s.handleHealth)
88: 
89: 	v1 := s.router.Group("/v1")
90: 	{
91: 		v1.Use(loggingMiddleware())
92: 		if s.config.EnableAuth {
93: 			v1.Use(s.authMiddleware())
94: 		}
95: 		v1.POST("/agent-runtime", s.handleAgentRuntimeCreate)
96: 		v1.DELETE("/agent-runtime/sessions/:sessionId", s.handleDeleteSandbox)
97: 		v1.POST("/code-interpreter", s.handleCodeInterpreterCreate)
98: 		v1.DELETE("/code-interpreter/sessions/:sessionId", s.handleDeleteSandbox)
99: 	}
100: }
101: 
102: func (s *Server) handleHealth(c *gin.Context) {
103: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "healthy"})
104: }
105: 
106: func (s *Server) handleAgentRuntimeCreate(c *gin.Context) {
107: 	var req types.CreateSandboxRequest
108: 	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
109: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{Message: "Invalid request body"})
110: 		return
111: 	}
112: 
113: 	req.Kind = types.AgentRuntimeKind
114: 	if err := req.Validate(); err != nil {
115: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{Message: err.Error()})
116: 		return
117: 	}
118: 
119: 	resp, err := s.createSandbox(c.Request.Context(), &req, types.AgentRuntimeKind)
120: 	if err != nil {
121: 		s.handleError(c, err)
122: 		return
123: 	}
124: 
125: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, resp)
126: }
127: 
128: func (s *Server) handleCodeInterpreterCreate(c *gin.Context) {
129: 	var req types.CreateSandboxRequest
130: 	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
131: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{Message: "Invalid request body"})
132: 		return
133: 	}
134: 
135: 	req.Kind = types.CodeInterpreterKind
136: 	if err := req.Validate(); err != nil {
137: 		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, ErrorResponse{Message: err.Error()})
138: 		return
139: 	}
140: 
141: 	resp, err := s.createSandbox(c.Request.Context(), &req, types.CodeInterpreterKind)
142: 	if err != nil {
143: 		s.handleError(c, err)
144: 		return
145: 	}
146: 
147: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, resp)
148: }
149: 
150: func (s *Server) createSandbox(ctx context.Context, req *types.CreateSandboxRequest, kind string) (*types.CreateSandboxResponse, error) {
151: 	sessionID := uuid.New().String()
152: 	sandboxID := uuid.New().String()
153: 	sandboxName := fmt.Sprintf("%s-%s", req.Name, sandboxID[:8])
154: 
155: 	sandboxInfo := &types.SandboxInfo{
156: 		Kind:             kind,
157: 		SandboxID:        sandboxID,
158: 		SandboxNamespace: req.Namespace,
159: 		Name:             sandboxName,
160: 		SessionID:        sessionID,
161: 		CreatedAt:        time.Now(),
162: 		ExpiresAt:        time.Now().Add(DefaultSandboxTTL),
163: 		Status:           "pending",
164: 	}
165: 
166: 	if err := s.storeClient.StoreSandbox(ctx, sandboxInfo); err != nil {
167: 		return nil, err
168: 	}
169: 
170: 	sandboxObj := s.buildSandboxObject(sandboxInfo, req, kind)
171: 
172: 	watchCh := s.sandboxController.WatchSandboxOnce(sandboxInfo.SandboxNamespace, sandboxInfo.Name)
173: 
174: 	dynamicClient := s.k8sClient.dynamicClient
175: 	gvr := SandboxGVR
176: 	_, err := dynamicClient.Resource(gvr).Namespace(sandboxInfo.SandboxNamespace).Create(ctx, sandboxObj, metav1.CreateOptions{})
177: 	if err != nil {
178: 		s.storeClient.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)
179: 		return nil, err
180: 	}
181: 
182: 	select {
183: 	case <-watchCh:
184: 		podIP, err := s.resolvePodIP(ctx, sandboxInfo)
185: 		if err != nil {
186: 			s.rollbackSandbox(ctx, sandboxInfo, kind)
187: 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to resolve pod IP: %w", err)
188: 		}
189: 
190: 		entryPoints := s.buildEntryPoints(sandboxInfo, podIP)
191: 		sandboxInfo.EntryPoints = entryPoints
192: 		sandboxInfo.Status = "running"
193: 
194: 		if err := s.storeClient.UpdateSandbox(ctx, sandboxInfo); err != nil {
195: 			klog.Warningf("failed to update sandbox: %v", err)
196: 		}
197: 
198: 		return &types.CreateSandboxResponse{
199: 			SessionID:   sessionID,
200: 			SandboxID:   sandboxID,
201: 			SandboxName: sandboxName,
202: 			EntryPoints: entryPoints,
203: 		}, nil
204: 	case <-time.After(2 * time.Minute):
205: 		s.rollbackSandbox(ctx, sandboxInfo, kind)
206: 		return nil, errors.New("sandbox creation timed out")
207: 	case <-ctx.Done():
208: 		s.rollbackSandbox(ctx, sandboxInfo, kind)
209: 		return nil, ctx.Err()
210: 	}
211: }
212: 
213: func (s *Server) rollbackSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxInfo *types.SandboxInfo, kind string) {
214: 	deleteCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Second)
215: 	defer cancel()
216: 
217: 	gvr := SandboxGVR
218: 	s.k8sClient.dynamicClient.Resource(gvr).Namespace(sandboxInfo.SandboxNamespace).Delete(deleteCtx, sandboxInfo.Name, metav1.DeleteOptions{})
219: 	s.storeClient.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sandboxInfo.SessionID)
220: }
221: 
222: func (s *Server) resolvePodIP(ctx context.Context, sandboxInfo *types.SandboxInfo) (string, error) {
223: 	podName := sandboxInfo.Name
224: 
225: 	pod, err := s.k8sClient.podLister.Pods(sandboxInfo.SandboxNamespace).Get(podName)
226: 	if err != nil {
227: 		return "", err
228: 	}
229: 
230: 	if pod.Status.Phase != corev1.PodRunning {
231: 		return "", fmt.Errorf("pod is not running: %s", pod.Status.Phase)
232: 	}
233: 
234: 	if pod.Status.PodIP == "" {
235: 		return "", errors.New("pod has no IP")
236: 	}
237: 
238: 	return pod.Status.PodIP, nil
239: }
240: 
241: func (s *Server) buildEntryPoints(sandboxInfo *types.SandboxInfo, podIP string) []types.SandboxEntryPoint {
242: 	return []types.SandboxEntryPoint{
243: 		{
244: 			Path:     "/",
245: 			Protocol: "HTTP",
246: 			Endpoint: fmt.Sprintf("%s:8080", podIP),
247: 		},
248: 	}
249: }
250: 
251: func (s *Server) buildSandboxObject(sandboxInfo *types.SandboxInfo, req *types.CreateSandboxRequest, kind string) map[string]interface{} {
252: 	return map[string]interface{}{
253: 		"apiVersion": "agents.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1",
254: 		"kind":       "Sandbox",
255: 		"metadata": map[string]interface{}{
256: 			"name":      sandboxInfo.Name,
257: 			"namespace": sandboxInfo.SandboxNamespace,
258: 			"labels": map[string]string{
259: 				"managed-by":         "agentcube-workload-manager",
260: 				SessionIdLabelKey:    sandboxInfo.SessionID,
261: 				WorkloadNameLabelKey: req.Name,
262: 				SandboxNameLabelKey:  sandboxInfo.Name,
263: 			},
264: 			"annotations": map[string]string{
265: 				LastActivityAnnotationKey: time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339),
266: 				IdleTimeoutAnnotationKey:  DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout.String(),
267: 			},
268: 		},
269: 		"spec": map[string]interface{}{
270: 			"lifecycle": map[string]interface{}{
271: 				"shutdownTime": time.Now().Add(DefaultSandboxTTL).Format(time.RFC3339),
272: 			},
273: 			"replicas": 1,
274: 		},
275: 	}
276: }
277: 
278: func (s *Server) handleDeleteSandbox(c *gin.Context) {
279: 	sessionID := c.Param("sessionId")
280: 
281: 	sandboxInfo, err := s.storeClient.GetSandboxBySessionID(c.Request.Context(), sessionID)
282: 	if err != nil {
283: 		if errors.Is(err, store.ErrNotFound) {
284: 			c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, ErrorResponse{Message: fmt.Sprintf("Session ID %s not found, maybe already deleted", sessionID)})
285: 			return
286: 		}
287: 		s.handleError(c, err)
288: 		return
289: 	}
290: 
291: 	var gvr schema.GroupVersionResource
292: 	if sandboxInfo.Kind == types.SandboxClaimsKind {
293: 		gvr = SandboxClaimGVR
294: 	} else {
295: 		gvr = SandboxGVR
296: 	}
297: 
298: 	err = s.k8sClient.dynamicClient.Resource(gvr).Namespace(sandboxInfo.SandboxNamespace).Delete(c.Request.Context(), sandboxInfo.Name, metav1.DeleteOptions{})
299: 	if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, metav1.ErrNotFound) {
300: 		s.handleError(c, err)
301: 		return
302: 	}
303: 
304: 	s.storeClient.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(c.Request.Context(), sessionID)
305: 
306: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "Sandbox deleted successfully"})
307: }
308: 
309: func (s *Server) handleError(c *gin.Context, err error) {
310: 	klog.Errorf("error handling request: %v", err)
311: 	c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, ErrorResponse{Message: "internal server error"})
312: }
313: 
314: func loggingMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
315: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
316: 		start := time.Now()
317: 		c.Next()
318: 		klog.Infof("%s %s %d %v", c.Request.Method, c.Request.URL.Path, c.Writer.Status(), time.Since(start))
319: 	}
320: }
321: 
322: func (s *Server) authMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
323: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
324: 		authHeader := c.GetHeader("Authorization")
325: 		if authHeader == "" {
326: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, ErrorResponse{Message: "Missing authorization header"})
327: 			return
328: 		}
329: 
330: 		parts := strings.Split(authHeader, " ")
331: 		if len(parts) != 2 || parts[0] != "Bearer" {
332: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, ErrorResponse{Message: "Invalid authorization header format"})
333: 			return
334: 		}
335: 
336: 		token := parts[1]
337: 		username, err := s.validateServiceAccountToken(c.Request.Context(), token)
338: 		if err != nil {
339: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, ErrorResponse{Message: "Invalid token"})
340: 			return
341: 		}
342: 
343: 		c.Set("userToken", token)
344: 		c.Set("username", username)
345: 		c.Next()
346: 	}
347: }
348: 
349: func (s *Server) validateServiceAccountToken(ctx context.Context, token string) (string, error) {
350: 	if username, ok := s.tokenCache.Get(token); ok {
351: 		return username, nil
352: 	}
353: 
354: 	review := &corev1.TokenReview{
355: 		Spec: corev1.TokenReviewSpec{
356: 			Token: token,
357: 		},
358: 	}
359: 
360: 	result, err := s.k8sClient.clientset.AuthenticationV1().TokenReviews().Create(ctx, review, metav1.CreateOptions{})
361: 	if err != nil {
362: 		return "", err
363: 	}
364: 
365: 	if !result.Status.Authenticated {
366: 		return "", errors.New("token not authenticated")
367: 	}
368: 
369: 	username := result.Status.User.Username
370: 	s.tokenCache.Set(token, username)
371: 
372: 	return username, nil
373: }
374: 
375: func (s *Server) initK8sClient() error {
376: 	config, err := rest.InClusterConfig()
377: 	if err != nil {
378: 		config, err = rest.DefaultClientConfig(&rest.Config{}).ClientConfig()
379: 		if err != nil {
380: 			return err
381: 		}
382: 	}
383: 
384: 	config.QPS = 50
385: 	config.Burst = 100
386: 
387: 	clientset, err := kubernetes.NewForConfig(config)
388: 	if err != nil {
389: 		return err
390: 	}
391: 
392: 	dynamicClient, err := dynamic.NewForConfig(config)
393: 	if err != nil {
394: 		return err
395: 	}
396: 
397: 	s.k8sClient = &K8sClient{
398: 		clientset:     clientset,
399: 		dynamicClient: dynamicClient,
400: 		baseConfig:    config,
401: 		clientCache:   NewClientCache(100),
402: 	}
403: 
404: 	return nil
405: }
406: 
407: func (s *Server) Start(ctx context.Context) error {
408: 	addr := ":" + s.config.Port
409: 	s.httpServer = &http.Server{
410: 		Addr:        addr,
411: 		Handler:     s.router,
412: 		ReadTimeout: 15 * time.Second,
413: 		IdleTimeout: 90 * time.Second,
414: 	}
415: 
416: 	if err := s.storeClient.Ping(ctx); err != nil {
417: 		return fmt.Errorf("store ping failed: %w", err)
418: 	}
419: 
420: 	go s.runGarbageCollector(ctx)
421: 
422: 	klog.Infof("Starting workload manager server on %s", addr)
423: 	return s.httpServer.ListenAndServe()
424: }
425: 
426: func (s *Server) Shutdown(ctx context.Context) error {
427: 	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 15*time.Second)
428: 	defer cancel()
429: 	return s.httpServer.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
430: }
431: 
432: func (s *Server) runGarbageCollector(ctx context.Context) {
433: 	ticker := time.NewTicker(15 * time.Second)
434: 	defer ticker.Stop()
435: 
436: 	for {
437: 		select {
438: 		case <-ctx.Done():
439: 			return
440: 		case <-ticker.C:
441: 			s.garbageCollect(ctx)
442: 		}
443: 	}
444: }
445: 
446: func (s *Server) garbageCollect(ctx context.Context) {
447: 	gcCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 2*time.Minute)
448: 	defer cancel()
449: 
450: 	inactiveCutoff := time.Now().Add(-DefaultSandboxIdleTimeout)
451: 	inactive, err := s.storeClient.ListInactiveSandboxes(gcCtx, inactiveCutoff, 16)
452: 	if err != nil {
453: 		klog.Warningf("failed to list inactive sandboxes: %v", err)
454: 	}
455: 
456: 	expired, err := s.storeClient.ListExpiredSandboxes(gcCtx, time.Now(), 16)
457: 	if err != nil {
458: 		klog.Warningf("failed to list expired sandboxes: %v", err)
459: 	}
460: 
461: 	seen := make(map[string]bool)
462: 	for _, sandbox := range append(inactive, expired...) {
463: 		if seen[sandbox.SessionID] {
464: 			continue
465: 		}
466: 		seen[sandbox.SessionID] = true
467: 
468: 		var gvr schema.GroupVersionResource
469: 		if sandbox.Kind == types.SandboxClaimsKind {
470: 			gvr = SandboxClaimGVR
471: 		} else {
472: 			gvr = SandboxGVR
473: 		}
474: 
475: 		err := s.k8sClient.dynamicClient.Resource(gvr).Namespace(sandbox.SandboxNamespace).Delete(gcCtx, sandbox.Name, metav1.DeleteOptions{})
476: 		if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, metav1.ErrNotFound) {
477: 			klog.Warningf("failed to delete sandbox %s: %v", sandbox.Name, err)
478: 			continue
479: 		}
480: 
481: 		s.storeClient.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(gcCtx, sandbox.SessionID)
482: 	}
483: }

(End of file - total 483 lines)
